name: The Fool
meaning_upright: New beginnings, spontaneity, innocence, leap of faith, free spirit.
meaning_reversed: Recklessness, hesitation, naivety, poor judgment, fear of change.
love: new romance, emotional openness, spontaneous connection, taking a chance on love
career: new career path, taking a professional risk, entrepreneurial leap, learning through experience
spiritual: spiritual beginning, trust in the journey, openness to the unknown, following inner guidance

name: The Magician
meaning_upright: Manifestation, willpower, resourcefulness, skill, focused action.
meaning_reversed: Manipulation, untapped talent, scattered energy, trickery, illusion.
love: strong attraction, romantic initiative, clear intentions, creating the relationship you desire
career: skillful execution, using available resources, career initiative, turning ideas into results
spiritual: focused intention, conscious manifestation, aligning will and action, recognizing personal power

name: The High Priestess
meaning_upright: Intuition, inner wisdom, mystery, the subconscious, stillness.
meaning_reversed: Ignored intuition, secrets, disconnection from self, hidden agendas, surface knowledge.
love: unspoken feelings, emotional intuition, hidden attraction, a private or mysterious connection
career: trusting professional intuition, working behind the scenes, confidential matters, patient observation
spiritual: inner wisdom, sacred mystery, intuitive awareness, listening to the subconscious

name: The Empress
meaning_upright: Abundance, nurturing, fertility, creativity, sensuality.
meaning_reversed: Creative block, smothering, self-neglect, dependence, stagnation.
love: nurturing love, affection, sensuality, emotional abundance
career: creative growth, supportive workplace, productive abundance, nurturing a project
spiritual: connection with nature, creative life force, receptive abundance, nurturing spiritual growth

name: The Emperor
meaning_upright: Structure, authority, stability, leadership, discipline.
meaning_reversed: Rigidity, control issues, domination, lack of discipline, abuse of power.
love: commitment, stability, protection, a structured relationship
career: leadership, structure, authority, long-term career stability
spiritual: spiritual discipline, inner authority, grounded leadership, creating stable foundations

name: The Hierophant
meaning_upright: Tradition, guidance, shared values, institutions, mentorship.
meaning_reversed: Rebellion, questioning convention, restriction, dogma, breaking rules.
love: traditional commitment, shared values, marriage, spiritual partnership
career: established institutions, mentorship, formal training, conventional career path
spiritual: spiritual tradition, sacred teachings, mentorship, shared beliefs and ritual

name: The Lovers
meaning_upright: Love, union, alignment, meaningful choice, harmony.
meaning_reversed: Disharmony, misalignment, avoidance of choice, temptation, imbalance.
love: deep connection, mutual attraction, relationship choices, emotional alignment
career: aligned career choice, productive partnership, values-based decision, important professional commitment
spiritual: alignment with core values, sacred union, conscious choice, integrating inner opposites

name: The Chariot
meaning_upright: Determination, victory, willpower, self-control, momentum.
meaning_reversed: Lack of direction, aggression, obstacles, scattered forces, loss of control.
love: pursuing love, relationship progress, shared direction, overcoming romantic obstacles
career: ambition, focused progress, overcoming competition, taking control of your career
spiritual: spiritual determination, directing inner forces, disciplined progress, mastery through focus

name: Strength
meaning_upright: Courage, inner strength, patience, compassion, gentle power.
meaning_reversed: Self-doubt, raw emotion, impatience, insecurity, forcing.
love: patience in love, gentle devotion, emotional courage, compassionate support
career: quiet leadership, professional confidence, patience under pressure, managing challenges with composure
spiritual: inner courage, compassionate self-mastery, gentle resilience, transforming instinct with awareness

name: The Hermit
meaning_upright: Introspection, solitude, inner guidance, wisdom, searching.
meaning_reversed: Isolation, loneliness, withdrawal, lost direction, avoidance.
love: time alone, romantic introspection, emotional distance, understanding personal needs
career: independent work, career reflection, specialist expertise, seeking meaningful direction
spiritual: solitude and reflection, inner searching, spiritual guidance, discovering personal truth

name: Wheel of Fortune
meaning_upright: Change, cycles, destiny, turning point, luck.
meaning_reversed: Resistance to change, bad luck, repeating cycles, setbacks, clinging.
love: change in love, unexpected encounter, relationship turning point, repeating romantic cycles
career: changing opportunities, career turning point, unexpected progress, adapting to professional cycles
spiritual: cycles of growth, accepting change, karmic patterns, trusting life’s movement

name: Justice
meaning_upright: Fairness, truth, accountability, cause and effect, clarity.
meaning_reversed: Unfairness, dishonesty, avoiding accountability, bias, imbalance.
love: honesty, relationship balance, accountability, fair decisions in love
career: fair evaluation, contracts and legal matters, accountable decisions, merit-based outcome
spiritual: spiritual accountability, cause and effect, ethical alignment, balancing actions and consequences

name: The Hanged Man
meaning_upright: Surrender, new perspective, pause, letting go, suspension.
meaning_reversed: Stalling, resistance, martyrdom, indecision, wasted sacrifice.
love: romantic pause, changing perspective, emotional surrender, waiting for clarity
career: career pause, delayed progress, new perspective, reconsidering professional priorities
spiritual: surrender, altered perspective, spiritual pause, releasing attachment to control

name: Death
meaning_upright: Endings, transformation, transition, release, renewal.
meaning_reversed: Resistance to endings, stagnation, fear of change, holding on, incomplete closure.
love: relationship transformation, ending a romantic chapter, emotional release, a new beginning after change
career: career transition, ending an outdated role, professional reinvention, making space for change
spiritual: spiritual transformation, release and renewal, ending an old identity, embracing necessary change

name: Temperance
meaning_upright: Balance, moderation, patience, blending, healing.
meaning_reversed: Excess, imbalance, impatience, friction, overcorrection.
love: emotional harmony, patient love, healthy compromise, gradual relationship growth
career: work-life balance, collaborative teamwork, steady progress, integrating different skills
spiritual: inner harmony, spiritual integration, healing through balance, patient transformation

name: The Devil
meaning_upright: Attachment, temptation, unhealthy patterns, materialism, feeling trapped.
meaning_reversed: Breaking free, reclaiming power, awareness, release, recovery.
love: intense attraction, unhealthy attachment, temptation, controlling relationship patterns
career: unhealthy attachment to work, material ambition, restrictive job, workplace power dynamics
spiritual: recognizing attachment, confronting the shadow, reclaiming personal freedom, breaking limiting patterns

name: The Tower
meaning_upright: Sudden upheaval, revelation, collapse of the false, disruption, awakening.
meaning_reversed: Averted disaster, fear of change, delayed collapse, resisting the inevitable, internal upheaval.
love: sudden breakup, shocking revelation, relationship upheaval, rebuilding after conflict
career: sudden career disruption, organizational upheaval, job loss or major change, rebuilding professionally
spiritual: spiritual awakening through disruption, collapse of false beliefs, sudden revelation, rebuilding on truth

name: The Star
meaning_upright: Hope, renewal, healing, inspiration, faith.
meaning_reversed: Discouragement, lost faith, disconnection, self-doubt, dimmed hope.
love: hope in love, emotional healing, renewed trust, an inspiring connection
career: renewed career hope, inspired work, visibility for your talents, promising long-term direction
spiritual: renewed faith, spiritual healing, authentic purpose, guidance and inspiration

name: The Moon
meaning_upright: Illusion, intuition, uncertainty, the subconscious, dreams.
meaning_reversed: Clarity emerging, released fear, truth surfacing, confusion lifting, self-deception ending.
love: romantic uncertainty, hidden emotions, mixed signals, trusting emotional intuition
career: career uncertainty, unclear workplace dynamics, hidden information, cautious professional intuition
spiritual: subconscious exploration, intuitive sensitivity, spiritual uncertainty, moving through illusion

name: The Sun
meaning_upright: Joy, success, vitality, clarity, confidence.
meaning_reversed: Dimmed joy, temporary setbacks, pessimism, burnout, delayed success.
love: happiness in love, mutual warmth, joyful partnership, openness and affection
career: career success, recognition, professional confidence, rewarding collaboration
spiritual: spiritual clarity, joyful awareness, vitality and truth, connection with the authentic self

name: Judgement
meaning_upright: Awakening, reckoning, renewal, calling, self-evaluation.
meaning_reversed: Self-criticism, ignoring the call, stuck in the past, harsh judgment, avoidance.
love: relationship renewal, reconciliation, emotional awakening, an important romantic decision
career: career calling, performance review, second chance, decisive professional awakening
spiritual: spiritual awakening, answering an inner calling, self-evaluation, release from the past

name: The World
meaning_upright: Completion, fulfillment, wholeness, achievement, integration.
meaning_reversed: Incompletion, loose ends, delayed closure, shortcuts, unfinished business.
love: lasting fulfillment, relationship completion, mature partnership, reaching a shared milestone
career: career achievement, project completion, professional mastery, international opportunities
spiritual: spiritual completion, wholeness, integration of lessons, connection with the greater whole
